1. **Leaves Divided** — What is the leaf form?", "Botanical illustration for option 1:", {"image": "/Users/lindseyma/Documents/GitHub/arborphy/newcomb_wildflower_guide/illustrations/leaves_divided.png"}, "
2. **Leaves Entire** — What is the leaf form?", "Botanical illustration for option 2:", {"image": "/Users/lindseyma/Documents/GitHub/arborphy/newcomb_wildflower_guide/illustrations/leaves_entire.png"}, "
3. **Leaves Toothed or Lobed** — What is the leaf form?", "Botanical illustration for option 3:", {"image": "/Users/lindseyma/Documents/GitHub/arborphy/newcomb_wildflower_guide/illustrations/leaves_toothed.png"}, "
4. **No Apparent Leaves** — What is the leaf form?", "
5. **Cannot determine from this image**", "
Respond with ONLY the exact option text (e.g., "Leaves Divided") or "Cannot determine from this image"."]
